summary: AuthGate now renders WalletAuthScreen inline on protected routes instead of redirect. Sign-in exposes in-app auth methods (google, email, passkey) and external wallet connectors (MetaMask, Coinbase, Rainbow, Rabby). useWalletAddressSync persists real-wallet to the active company row. useStoredWalletAddress provides fallback for post-reload header consistency. 13 passing tests cover all assertion paths.

codeQuality.structure: Clean separation: AuthGate (route protection), WalletAuthScreen (UI), useWalletAddressSync (persistence), useStoredWalletAddress (fallback). All use the existing Supabase client.
codeQuality.security: No secrets exposed in browser code. Wallet address sync operates through supabase client which handles auth headers.
codeQuality.testCoverage: 13 tests covering ThirdwebProvider init, WalletAuthScreen rendering, AuthGate behavior (connected/disconnected/bypass), wallet-to-company sync, and truncated address display.
codeQuality.patterns: Follows existing hook patterns. Uses supabase.functions.invoke for edge function calls.
